fieldValues.fieldValue: Floor plans generated - ready for owner review

parameters.content:
## DD-2 Floor Plan Generator
POST /webhook/floor-plan-generator with JSON body: project_id (uuid, required), width_ft, depth_ft, rooms (2-12), design_type (Standard | Premium | Luxury) - all optional with defaults.

Deterministic 2-band layout with central corridor. The 2D SVG is stored inline as a data URI in plan_2d_svg_url and the 3D box model JSON as a data URI in plan_3d_model_url (Supabase Storage upload is out of scope in tester mode). dimensions_json and materials_json hold the structured breakdowns.

Tester mode: NO email nodes - notifications are communications rows only.
Manual step: repoint Supabase credential dsZvYaB5av1RwbxL to https://fwzdhmobfcwsspobrvdl.supabase.co (service_role key).
